title: PRD: Pokemon Champions Trainer Companion
summary: Product requirements doc v1.0 (Apr 10 2026) defining the 8-week MVP scope, F1-F6 features, data model, and phasing for a personal Pokemon Champions companion app.
notes: PRD content corroborates: explicit '# PRD:' H1, sections for Goals/Non-goals, Success Metrics, User Personas, Core Features F1-F6, Stretch features F7+.
